steps.description: Type  ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}}  into the "Input an application name" text field in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension popup within Visual Studio Code.
Press Enter to confirm the application name ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}} in the input dialog at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Right-click on the "Preview: README.md" tab header in the Visual Studio Code editor to open the context menu for tab-specific actions.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu of the "README.md" tab within Visual Studio Code to close the currently open file.
Open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code by pressing Ctrl+Shift+P from the Explorer.
Type 'notifications: clear' into the VS Code Command Palette input field to search for the "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" command.
Press Enter to select "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" in the VS Code Command Palette.
